name: astrosteveo-claude-plugins
description: Curated list of Claude Code plugins for Engineers

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Conventional Commits skill for Claude Code

plugins.name: godot-dev
plugins.description: Godot 4.x development skill with engine conventions, architecture patterns, and Recipe-Generator pattern

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Codebase quality skills — code-quality for comprehensive audits, code-sniffer for detecting code smells and AI slop

plugins.name: reconcile-memory
plugins.description: Audit and reconcile Claude Code auto-memory files — deduplication, contradiction detection, staleness assessment, and context hygiene

plugins.name: develop
plugins.description: End-to-end development workflow — adaptive phases for features, bug fixes, refactors, and any substantial code change

plugins.name: autopilot
plugins.description: Autonomous development mode — Claude continuously analyzes the codebase and implements improvements in a loop

plugins.name: local-memory
plugins.description: Configure auto-memory to live inside the project for version control
